query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A young man in a white graphic t-shirt and dark blue jeans is swinging on a tire swing suspended by a rope, with his body extended horizontally and both hands gripping the rope above the tire. He wears black sneakers with white soles. In the background, a white SUV is parked in front of a light brown house with horizontal siding, and trees with autumn foliage are visible. The scene takes place in a residential yard with dry, brown ground cover.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A young man in a white graphic t-shirt and dark blue jeans is swinging on a tire swing with his body extended horizontally, captured with dramatic intentional motion blur that streaks the background into horizontal smears of color. The autumn trees, white SUV, and light brown house behind him all dissolve into flowing, painterly streaks of ochre, green, and white, while the man himself remains relatively sharper against the blurred motion, emphasizing the speed and kinetic energy of the swing arc.
